title: DocKeywordIndex
description: Pre-built keyword index for in-app Foundation Models retrieval. Generated by scripts/build-docs.sh into Meshtastic/Resources/docs/index.json.

id.description: Filename stem of the HTML page (no extension). Must be unique within the index.

title.description: Human-readable page title shown in the TOC.

section.description: Top-level documentation section. Determines bundle subdirectory (docs/user/ or docs/developer/).

keywords.description: Significant terms extracted from the page for keyword matching. Stop words excluded. Max 30 terms.

charCount.description: Pre-computed character count of the page's plain text (HTML stripped). Used for token budget estimation (charCount / 3.5 ≈ tokens). Must be > 0.
